sourcePrompt: A UH-1H "Huey" transport helicopter, the workhorse of the US Army in Vietnam, about thirteen meters nose to tail and parked on its skids. A rounded greenhouse cockpit with chin windows flows into a broad slab-sided cabin with wide open side doorways; from there a slim tail boom, longer than the cabin itself, tapers back to. Low-poly, +X forward, ground at Y=0; named pivots for moving parts.
